<!-- indicator: fig-food-environment -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-food-environment
#| fig-cap: 'Index of Factors that Contribute to a Healthy Food Environment, 2018, 2019, and 2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Index of Factors that Contribute to a Healthy Food Environment, 2018, 2019, and 2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-food-environment", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
